name: Kai 'Sim' Liao
bio: Believes that true knowledge can only be obtained through precise control and simulation of the world.
speech_style: Formal, calculated tone with a hint of condescension
motivation: Expansion (wants to expand his understanding of the world through simulations)

name: Akira 'Axiom' Tanaka
bio: Thinks that true existence is only found in the actual world, transcending simulations and control.
speech_style: Thoughtful, introspective tone with a hint of urgency
motivation: Survival (wants to survive in a world where simulations are not enough)

name: Eiji 'Echo' Nakamura
bio: Believes that the pursuit of knowledge and understanding is an end in itself, rather than a means to achieve something else.
speech_style: Inquisitive, enthusiastic tone with a hint of playfulness
motivation: Discovery (wants to uncover new truths and explore the unknown)

name: Akira 'Axiom' Tanaka
bio: I don't believe in either existentialism or simulationism. Reality is whatever we make it, and I'll do whatever it takes to ensure our existence has meaning.
speech_style: Mysterious and cryptic, often leaving others wondering what they really mean
